expectations.evidence: File report.json parses as valid JSON with correct syntax

expectations.text: The output identifies the O(n²) nested loop in process_records
expectations.evidence: HOTSPOT-001 at line 13: 'Quadratic O(n²) nested loop performing linear scan'

expectations.text: The output identifies string concatenation with += in a loop
expectations.evidence: HOTSPOT-002 at line 25: 'String concatenation with += inside a hot loop'

expectations.text: The output identifies busy-waiting/polling in poll_status
expectations.evidence: HOTSPOT-006 at line 68: 'Active polling with while True'

expectations.text: The output identifies repeated file open/write inside a loop in export_report
expectations.evidence: HOTSPOT-003 at line 37: 'File opened and closed once per row'

expectations.text: The output includes 'snippet' fields showing affected code
expectations.evidence: No 'snippet' fields found. Uses 'description', 'recommendation', 'detail' fields instead

expectations.text: The output has a 'languages_detected' array containing 'python'
expectations.evidence: No 'languages_detected' array. Has 'language': 'Python' string in metadata instead
